sourceText: A truly educated person is not the one who has mastered all sciences, but the one who has disciplined their own soul.
translatedText: Mutum mai ilimi na gaske ba shine wanda ya mallaki dukkan ilimomi ba, amma wanda ya hore ransa.

sourceText: This reflects her emphasis not just on accumulating knowledge, but on the importance of character development and self-reflection through scholarship.
translatedText: Wannan yana nuna mahimmancinta ba kawai akan tara ilimi ba, amma akan mahimmancin haɓaka ɗabi'a da tunanin kai ta hanyar karatu.

sourceText: Living under the Mongol domination known as the 'Tatar Yoke,' his era was filled with constant violence and political instability. He faced the internal conflict between his personal artistic vision and his monastic vow of humility, bearing the spiritual burden of expressing divine peace in a chaotic world.
translatedText: Rayuwa a ƙarƙashin mulkin Mongol da aka sani da 'Tatar Yoke,' zamaninsa ya cika da tashin hankali da rashin kwanciyar hankali na siyasa. Ya fuskanci rikice-rikice na cikin gida tsakanin hangen nesansa na fasaha da kuma alkawarinsa na tawali'u, yana ɗauke da nauyin ruhaniya na bayyana salama na Allah a cikin duniya mai ruɗi.

sourceText: Rublev found inner peace through prayer and meditation within his monastic community. He fulfilled his calling by transforming his art from mere decoration into a spiritual tool to reveal divine harmony and hope to the faithful. His icon, 'The Trinity,' is the culmination of this spiritual victory.
translatedText: Rublev ya sami kwanciyar hankali ta hanyar addu'a da tunani a cikin al'ummar sufi. Ya cika kiransa ta wurin canza fasaharsa daga ado kawai zuwa kayan aiki na ruhaniya don bayyana jituwa da bege na Allah ga masu aminci. Alamarsa, 'Uku-Uku-Cikin-Ɗaya,' shine ƙarshen wannan nasara ta ruhaniya.

sourceText: To paint an icon is a form of prayer, and every brushstroke is a whisper to God.
translatedText: Yin zanen gunki wani nau'i ne na addu'a, kuma kowane buroshi na rada ne ga Allah.

sourceText: This emphasizes that icon-making is not merely an artistic activity, but a deeply spiritual communion with the divine, where the creative process itself is an act of devotion.
translatedText: Wannan yana jaddada cewa yin gumaka ba aikin fasaha ba ne kawai, amma haɗin gwiwa mai zurfi na ruhaniya tare da allahntaka, inda tsarin halitta da kansa aikin ibada ne.

sourceText: True beauty lies in the divine harmony that can be found even amidst the chaos of the world.
translatedText: Kyawun gaskiya yana cikin jituwar Allah da ake iya samu ko da a cikin hargitsin duniya.

sourceText: His art was an attempt to transcend a painful reality and capture eternal spiritual truths of order, peace, and love, suggesting that these can be perceived even in troubled times.
translatedText: Sana'arsa ƙoƙari ce ta ƙetare gaskiya mai raɗaɗi da kama gaskiya na ruhaniya na tsari, salama, da ƙauna, yana ba da shawarar cewa ana iya fahimtar waɗannan ko da a lokutan wahala.

sourceText: Color is not mere pigment, but a vessel for divine light. Gold is the glory of God; blue, the mystery of Heaven.
translatedText: Launi ba launi ba ne kawai, amma jirgi ne na hasken Allah. Zinariya ɗaukakar Allah ce; blue, sirrin sama.

sourceText: For an iconographer, color is symbolic, and each hue is part of a theological language intended to lead the viewer beyond the material world to a spiritual reality.
translatedText: Ga mai zane-zane, launi alama ce, kuma kowane launi wani yanki ne na harshen tiyoloji da aka yi niyya don jagorantar mai kallo fiye da abin duniya zuwa ga gaskiya ta ruhaniya.

sourceText: Navigating the immense pressure of protecting his realm from two fronts: the Catholic Crusaders from the West and the powerful Mongol Empire (the Golden Horde) from the East.
translatedText: Kewaya babban matsin lamba na kare mulkinsa daga bangarori biyu: 'Yan Salibiyya Katolika daga Yamma da Daular Mongol mai karfi (Golden Horde) daga Gabas.

sourceText: Employing a dual policy: decisively defeating Western invaders militarily while pragmatically submitting to the Mongol khans to preserve the Russian lands, people, and Orthodox faith.
translatedText: Yin amfani da manufofin dual: fatattakar mamaya na Yamma da ƙarfi ta hanyar soja yayin da suke mika wuya ga Mongol khans don kiyaye ƙasashen Rasha, mutane, da bangaskiyar Orthodox.

sourceText: God is not in power, but in truth.
translatedText: Allah ba shi da iko, amma da gaskiya.
